programme.desc: Live and exclusive coverage from South American of the Copa Sudamericana.

programme.title: Real Madrid vs Bayern München - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: Real Madrid v Bayern Munich is already the most-played fixture in major European competition history. All 28 of their meetings have come in the European Cup/UEFA Champions League, with 26 of them taking place in the knockout stages. Bayern Munich are winless in their last nine games against Real Madrid ; they haven’t gone 10+ matches without a win against an opponent across all competitions since the period between 1988 and 1993 versus Werder Bremen.

programme.title: Sporting CP vs Arsenal - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: Sporting CP have never beaten Arsenal in seven attempts, including a 5-1 home loss in last season’s UEFA Champions League. However, they did eliminate Arsenal from the 2022-23 UEFA Europa League via penalty shootout. Arsenal have never won away against Portuguese opposition in the knockout stages of a major European competition before, most recently a 1-0 loss at FC Porto in the 2023-24 UEFA Champions League last 16.

programme.title: EN FA Cup Review Show 2025/26 | E4 - 6th Round
programme.desc: All the highlights and key stories from each round of the FA Cup. Hosted by Adam Smith with Aaron McLean and Adebayo Akinfenwa

programme.title: Barcelona vs Atlético de Madrid - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: Barcelona and Atlético Madrid will meet for a fifth time in European competition, with all five coming at the quarter-final stage of the UEFA Champions League. Atlético Madrid have only lost one of their previous four UEFA Champions League games against Barcelona, and have eliminated the Catalan side in both of their previous knockout stage ties. Only Paris SG have eliminated Barcelona more times in the knockout stages of the European Cup/Champions League.

programme.title: Paris Saint-Germain vs Liverpool - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: Paris SG and Liverpool have met on six previous occasions in European competition, with both sides registering three wins each. Their most recent meetings came in the UEFA Champions League last season, where both won 1-0 away from home in the round of 16, before the Parisians won on a penalty shootout at Anfield to progress. In last season’s round of 16 tie between these two sides, Liverpool averaged just 38.6% possession and had 14 fewer shots on target than opponents Paris SG across the two legs ; their biggest negative shot on target differential in a UEFA Champions League knockout stage tie on record.

Their most recent meetings came in the UEFA Champions League last season, where both won 1-0 away from home in the round of 16, before the Parisians won on a penalty shootout at Anfield to progress. In last season’s round of 16 tie between these two sides, Liverpool averaged just 38.6% possession and had 14 fewer shots on target than opponents Paris SG across the two legs ; their biggest negative shot on target differential in a UEFA Champions League knockout stage tie on record.

programme.title: Barcelona vs Atlético de Madrid - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: Barcelona and Atlético Madrid will meet for a fifth time in European competition, with all five coming at the quarter-final stage of the UEFA Champions League. Atlético Madrid have only lost one of their previous four UEFA Champions League games against Barcelona, and have eliminated the Catalan side in both of their previous knockout stage ties. Only Paris SG have eliminated Barcelona more times in the knockout stages of the European Cup/Champions League.

programme.title: Premier Padel Highlights 2026 - Miami P1
programme.desc: Highlights from the Miami P1, held in Miami, USA, from 22–29 March. Staged at the Miami Beach Convention Center, this Premier Padel P1 event features men’s and women’s main-draw action through to the finals. As a P1 tournament, it offers 1,000 ranking points to the winners and a total prize fund of €479,068.

programme.title: Barcelona vs Espanyol - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 31
programme.desc: All matches from the 2025–26 La Liga season are available live and exclusive only on beIN. La Liga, Spain's premier football competition, runs from 15 August 2025 until 24 May 2026. Barcelona are the defending champions, having won their 28th title the previous season.

programme.title: Rennes vs Angers SCO - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 29
programme.desc: Rennes have scored in each of their 27 home games against Angers in Ligue 1, the highest tally of home games against the same opponent for a team while scoring every time in the division. Rennes have won five of their last seven Ligue 1 matches, with only Monaco and Lille picking up more points than SRFC over the period. Rennes are three points off the podium heading into this MD29, having been 11 points behind third place after MD21 and at the time of Habib Beye's dismissal.

programme.title: Al Kabeer Season 5 Episode 27
programme.desc: Egyptian astronaut Mamdouh meets Hazalqoum’s team, which has been chosen to carry out the mission of destroying the meteor. The members undergo medical and psychological tests and prepare to mount the space shuttle.

programme.title: Al Kabeer Season 5 Episode 28
programme.desc: When Hazalqoum and his team land on the meteor, they lose connection with Earth, and decide to send nuclear missiles to detonate the meteor.

programme.title: Al Kabeer Season 5 Episode 29
programme.desc: Hazalqoum and Mamdouh quarrel over how to destroy the meteor. Later, while Mamdouh tries to reconnect with Earth, Ali realizes that the space shuttle has been severely damaged.

programme.title: Al Kabeer Season 5 Episode 30
programme.desc: Finale

programme.title: Al Kabeer Awi Season 6 Episode 1
programme.desc: In the absence of his wife, Al Kabeer’s state worsens when he gets busy taking care of his twins and neglects his duties as a village chief.

programme.title: Al Kabeer Awi Season 6 Episode 2
programme.desc: Al Kabeer’s problems intensify when his son consumes a dosage of Doctor Rabee’s invention that turns him into a giant.

programme.title: Al Kabeer Awi Season 6 Episode 3
programme.desc: Al Kabeer’s aunt returns after hearing that the family’s chiefdom may be revoked. The aunt sets a condition on Al Kabeer to return to his job.

programme.title: Al Kabeer Awi Season 6 Episode 4
programme.desc: The aunt picks a wife for Al Kabeer, who begins to feel pressured by the changes in his life. A new condition is set by the aunt on Al Kabeer’s marriage.

programme.title: Al Kabeer Awi Season 6 Episode 5
programme.desc: Al Kabeer seeks to find love again after his wife was gone, unaware that what he is looking for is closer than he imagines.

programme.title: Al Kabeer Awi Season 6 Episode 6
programme.desc: Al Kabeer seeks to find love again after his wife was gone, unaware that what he is looking for is closer than he imagines.

programme.title: Al Kabeer Awi Season 6 Episode 7
programme.desc: Al Kabeer and his family are kidnapped and brought to an unknown site. Meanwhile, they are forced to participate in a game of Alexandria’s statues.

programme.title: Al Kabeer Awi Season 6 Episode 8
programme.desc: Tensions intensify as Al Kabeer, his family, and the people of Mazareeta work hard to free themselves. The contests at the abduction sites remain on-going.

programme.title: Al Kabeer Awi Season 6 Episode 9
programme.desc: After three days have passed since the kidnapping of Al Kabeer and Mazareeta’s people, others participate in a competition with ropes and odd even games.

programme.title: Al Kabeer Awi Season 6 Episode 10
programme.desc: While Kabeer and his family attempt to escape, the kidnapper’s identity is revealed. Al Kabeer discovers that the abduction was part of a game.

programme.title: Al Kabeer Awi Season 6 Episode 11
programme.desc: Al Kabeer's brother surprises him in a visit, seeking Al Kabeer's help in finding his son's mother.

programme.title: Al Kabeer Awi Season 6 Episode 12
programme.desc: Hazalqoum visits his many wives in search of his son’s mother, starting with weightlifting Amino and educated Amjad. Halqoum spends time with Al Kabeer’s kids.

programme.title: Al Kabeer Awi Season 6 Episode 13
programme.desc: Al Kabeer discovers that multiple items were stolen from him and are being set for sale. Intent on fulfilling his task, Hazalqoum goes to his ex-wife, Nermine.

programme.title: Al Kabeer Awi Season 6 Episode 14
programme.desc: Al Atra feigns sickness to escape his bullies at school, but Al Kabeer gets involved and attempts to put a stop to all types of bullying.

programme.title: Al Kabeer Awi Season 6 Episode 15
programme.desc: Johnny and Hagras try to go viral on social media by making a video with Nafadi as an extra.

programme.title: Al Kabeer Awi Season 6 Episode 16
programme.desc: People around the village become more and more obsessed with social media. Al Kabeer’s content of choice makes Marbouha jealous while Hagras betrays Johnny.

programme.title: Al Kabeer Awi Season 6 Episode 17
programme.desc: The social media feud between Johnny and Hagras grows dangerously. Marbouha resorts to wearing bold fashion to get Al Kabeer’s attention.

programme.title: Al Kabeer Awi Season 6 Episode 18
programme.desc: Desperate to overcome Hagras, Johnny decides to buy social media followers and asks Al Kabeer for money, but the request is met with a violent reaction.

programme.title: Al Kabeer Awi Season 6 Episode 19
programme.desc: Al Kabeer’s mother visits Marbouha and makes a scene when she’s denied entry into the gentlemen’s club.

programme.title: Al Kabeer Awi Season 6 Episode 20
programme.desc: Hagras tries to talk Al Kabeer out of taking violent action and invites him to speak up on his social media channel. Infuriated, the women organize a protest.

programme.title: Al Kabeer Awi Season 6 Episode 21
programme.desc: Al Kabeer seeks to find love again after his wife was gone, unaware that what he is looking for is closer than he imagines.

programme.title: Al Kabeer Awi Season 6 Episode 22
programme.desc: Al Kabeer seeks to find love again after his wife was gone, unaware that what he is looking for is closer than he imagines.

programme.title: Al Kabeer Awi Season 6 Episode 23
programme.desc: Al Kabeer seeks to find love again after his wife was gone, unaware that what he is looking for is closer than he imagines.

programme.title: El Kebeer Awi Season 7 Episode 1
programme.desc: Al Kabeer experiences boredom in his life after his marriage to Marbouha. Johnny moves forward with his plan to open a gym.

programme.title: El Kebeer Awi Season 7 Episode 2
programme.desc: After overhearing one of Al Kabeer’s phone calls, Marbouha enlists the help of Johnny and Hagras to unlock his phone and find out if he's cheating on her.

programme.title: El Kebeer Awi Season 7 Episode 3
programme.desc: Johnny is disappointed to find out that people don’t care to use his gym the way he intended. Al Kabeer and Marbouha’s marriage counselling session goes badly for her.

programme.title: El Kebeer Awi Season 7 Episode 4
programme.desc: After they failed at fulfilling her first assignment, the doctor suggests that Al Kabeer and Marbouha try something new but various issues get in their way.

programme.title: El Kebeer Awi Season 7 Episode 5
programme.desc: In a final attempt to save their marriage, Al Kabeer and Marbouha listen to Jameela and travel to Cairo to escape the routine causing their constant fights.

programme.title: El Kebeer Awi Season 7 Episode 5
programme.desc: In a final attempt to save their marriage, Al Kabeer and Marbouha listen to Jameela and travel to Cairo to escape the routine causing their constant fights.

programme.title: El Kebeer Awi Season 7 Episode 6
programme.desc: As their next stop in touring Cairo, Al Kabeer takes Marbouha to a mall. But when he leaves her alone for a moment, her innocence puts her in grave danger.

programme.title: El Kebeer Awi Season 7 Episode 7
programme.desc: While Al Kabeer and Nafadi follow the available leads to find her, Marbouha looks for a way to escape Fakhri’s house.

programme.title: El Kebeer Awi Season 7 Episode 8
programme.desc: Al Kabeer interrogates Ahmed ElSaka to see if he is Marbouha’s kidnapper, while she despairs at ever being saved.

programme.title: El Kebeer Awi Season 7 Episode 9
programme.desc: When Johnny finds himself in need of money, Hagras shows him how to get it through social media and followers.

programme.title: El Kebeer Awi Season 7 Episode 10
programme.desc: When their video reaches millions of views, Johnny visits Shourou’ who gives him an an idea that could increase the number of their followers and earn them more money.

programme.title: El Kebeer Awi Season 7 Episode 11
programme.desc: Johnny tells Marbouha the truth about his engagement and swears her to secrecy. Shourou’ and Johnny’s plan is a success, but she takes it a step too far.

programme.title: El Kebeer Awi Season 7 Episode 12
programme.desc: When Johnny tries to get out of his deal with Shourou’, she reminds him of the papers he signed. To Al Kabeer’s displeasure, the couple throw an engagement party.

programme.title: El Kebeer Awi Season 7 Episode 13
programme.desc: When Etra gets into trouble during a karate competition, Al Kabeer asks Dr. Rabee’ for the potion that will bring his son back to normal.

programme.title: El Kebeer Awi Season 7 Episode 14
programme.desc: After seeing Etra in his new state, Al Kabeer returns to Dr. Rabi’ for revenge. Johnny and Hagras hold auditions for their play.

programme.title: El Kebeer Awi Season 7 Episode 15
programme.desc: Al Kabeer sends his men to search for Dr. Rabi’. Etra has a health setback. Johnny finds out that Hagras is taking bribes from people looking to act in the play.

programme.title: El Kebeer Awi Season 7 Episode 16
programme.desc: Al Kabeer pursues his search for Dr. Rabi’. During the first rehearsal, the script chosen by Hagras seems familiar to Johnny.

programme.title: El Kebeer Awi Season 7 Episode 17
programme.desc: When Johnny finds out that Etra’s lie got the media’s attention, he decides to use it to his advantage, unaware of the incoming danger. Al Kabeer gets a new formula.

programme.title: El Kebeer Awi Season 7 Episode 18
programme.desc: Hazalqoum gets his hands on a failing sock factory and discovers, on his first visit, the multiple issues he must deal with. Later, he runs into his arch nemesis.

programme.title: El Kebeer Awi Season 7 Episode 19
programme.desc: When Farouq crashes his TV interview, Hazalqoum makes a large bet against him. Then, realizing the mistake he just made, he seeks Al Kabeer and Nafadi's help to fix it.

programme.title: El Kebeer Awi Season 7 Episode 20
programme.desc: After training the new players of Al Mazarita FC, Rabi’ proposes organizing a friendly match to test them. Hazalqoum tries to affect the outcome of the game.

programme.title: El Kebeer Awi Season 7 Episode 21
programme.desc: Right when Hazalqoum is about to back out on the bet, Al Kabeer decides to help him. Hagras’ plea to join the team having been rejected, he seeks revenge.

programme.title: El Kebeer Awi Season 7 Episode 22
programme.desc: As the match begins, Hagras’ betrayal hits the team and the residents of Al Mazarita hard, but the latter is hiding a secret that could change the outcome of the game.

programme.title: El Kebeer Awi Season 7 Episode 23
programme.desc: Al Kabeera returns to Al Mazarita with important news to share with her nephews. Al Kabeer finds out that his arch nemesis is in town and starts searching for him.

programme.title: El Kebeer Awi Season 7 Episode 24
programme.desc: Johnny asks for Hagras’ help to make an impression on Al Kabeera’s fiancé, while Al Kabeer goes to extremes to find out who he is.

programme.title: El Kebeer Awi Season 7 Episode 25
programme.desc: Hofny El Dib arrives to Al Dawar to ask for Al Kabeera’s hand in marriage, but Johnny’s unfamiliarity with local traditions slows down the proceedings.

programme.title: El Kebeer Awi Season 7 Episode 26
programme.desc: After his various attempts at coming between Hofny and Al Kabeera fail, Al Kabeer decides to kill him, unaware that someone else has a similar plan.

programme.title: El Kebeer Awi Season 7 Episode 27
programme.desc: Al Kabeer sets his plan to get rid of Hofny in motion. Just when he is about to succeed, armed men crash the wedding.

programme.title: El Kebeer Awi Season 7 Episode 28
programme.desc: When he finds himself stuck in a tough situation, Mohamed Sallam remembers what happened to him during the Mazarita film festival and pays Hagras a visit.

programme.title: El Kebeer Awi Season 7 Episode 29
programme.desc: Sallam is arrested by Al Kabeer for Hagras’ crimes while the latter gets a visit from Al Prince.

programme.title: El Kebeer Awi Season 7 Episode 30
programme.desc: SEASON FINALE: Hagras starts shooting his series “Al Kabeer,” inspired by his life. Johnny and Sallam sneak onto the set to get their revenge.

A.F.C. Bournemouth vs. Manchester United - English Premier League 2026/2027
programme.desc: Bournemouth are unbeaten in their last five Premier League games against Manchester United, scoring more goals in these five than they did in their first 12 against the Red Devils in the division. Manchester United have lost just two of their eight away Premier League games against Bournemouth. Their last two visits to the Vitality Stadium have seen them come from behind to draw.

programme.title: Main Race - F1 Japan Grand Prix - 2026 - FIA Formula 1 World Championship 2026
programme.desc: 24 Grand Prix from the Formula 1 Season are live and exclusive only on beIN. All Practices, Qualifiers and Races are available live with a choice of Arabic or English commentary. The 2026 season will consist of 6 Sprint Races within the 24 weekends. For the first time 11 Teams and 22 Drivers will compete to win the World Formula 1 Championships for Drivers and Teams.

programme.title: Newcastle United vs. Sunderland - English Premier League 2026/2027
programme.desc: Newcastle are winless in their last five home league games against Sunderland, with this their first such meeting at St James’ Park since a 1-1 draw in March 2016. Sunderland are unbeaten in their last 10 league games against Newcastle, winning seven of the last eight. It’s the joint-longest run either side has had without defeat in the history of the fixture.

programme.title: Brighton & Hove Albion vs. Liverpool - English Premier League 2026/2027
programme.desc: Brighton have won two of their last three home league games against Liverpool, beating them 3-2 in this exact fixture last season. They’d only won one of their first 13 against the Reds. Following their 2-0 win at Anfield in December, Liverpool are looking to complete the league double over Brighton for the first time since 2019-20.

Highlights - UEFA Europa League 2025/2026
programme.desc: Highlights from the 2025–26 UEFA Europa League. The 2025–26 UEFA Europa League is the secondary club football tournament organised by UEFA. Tottenham Hotspur are the reigning champions. The final will be played on 20 May 2026 at Beşiktaş Stadium in Istanbul, Turkey.

programme.title: Platense (ARG) vs Corinthians (BRA) - Copa Libertadores 2026 - Group Stage
programme.desc: The 2026 Copa Libertadores is the highest level of competition in South American club football. The competition began on 3 February and is scheduled to end on 28 November 2026, with the final to be played in Montevideo, Uruguay. Flamengo are the defending champions.

programme.title: Paris Saint-Germain vs Liverpool - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: Paris SG and Liverpool have met on six previous occasions in European competition, with both sides registering three wins each. Their most recent meetings came in the UEFA Champions League last season, where both won 1-0 away from home in the round of 16, before the Parisians won on a penalty shootout at Anfield to progress. In last season’s round of 16 tie between these two sides, Liverpool averaged just 38.6% possession and had 14 fewer shots on target than opponents Paris SG across the two legs ; their biggest negative shot on target differential in a UEFA Champions League knockout stage tie on record.

programme.title: Real Madrid vs Bayern München - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: Real Madrid v Bayern Munich is already the most-played fixture in major European competition history. All 28 of their meetings have come in the European Cup/UEFA Champions League, with 26 of them taking place in the knockout stages. Bayern Munich are winless in their last nine games against Real Madrid ; they haven’t gone 10+ matches without a win against an opponent across all competitions since the period between 1988 and 1993 versus Werder Bremen.

programme.title: Barcelona vs Atlético de Madrid - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: Barcelona and Atlético Madrid will meet for a fifth time in European competition, with all five coming at the quarter-final stage of the UEFA Champions League. Atlético Madrid have only lost one of their previous four UEFA Champions League games against Barcelona, and have eliminated the Catalan side in both of their previous knockout stage ties. Only Paris SG have eliminated Barcelona more times in the knockout stages of the European Cup/Champions League.

programme.title: Highlights - UEFA Europa League 2025/2026
programme.desc: Highlights from the 2025–26 UEFA Europa League. The 2025–26 UEFA Europa League is the secondary club football tournament organised by UEFA. Tottenham Hotspur are the reigning champions. The final will be played on 20 May 2026 at Beşiktaş Stadium in Istanbul, Turkey.

programme.title: La Liga Highlights 2025/2026
programme.desc: "This 55-minute program offers full 5-minute highlights of each of the games played on Friday, Saturday and Sunday.LALIGA includes special video presentations of the best goal, the best save and the best player of the day."

programme.title: Ligue 1 Weekly Review - 2025/2026
programme.desc: Each Ligue 1 Match week is condensed into a 52-minute highlights show. Every game, goal, penalty, red card and everything in between is squeezed into an action-packed hour to ensure no football fan misses a kick across the game season.

programme.title: Ligue 1 Show - 2025/2026 - EP 29
programme.desc: All the greatest moments and action in Ligue 1 including incredible stories and interviews featuring ligue 1 stars.

programme.title: EPL The Big Interview 2025/2026
programme.desc: Extended sit-downs and more informal ‘out and about’ interviews with the Premier League’s biggest stars, providing players with a platform to tell their story in their own words.

programme.title: Sporting CP vs Arsenal - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: Sporting CP have never beaten Arsenal in seven attempts, including a 5-1 home loss in last season’s UEFA Champions League. However, they did eliminate Arsenal from the 2022-23 UEFA Europa League via penalty shootout. Arsenal have never won away against Portuguese opposition in the knockout stages of a major European competition before, most recently a 1-0 loss at FC Porto in the 2023-24 UEFA Champions League last 16.

programme.title: Paris Saint-Germain vs Liverpool - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: Paris SG and Liverpool have met on six previous occasions in European competition, with both sides registering three wins each. In last season’s round of 16 tie between these two sides, Liverpool averaged just 38.6% possession and had 14 fewer shots on target than opponents Paris SG across the two legs ; their biggest negative shot on target differential in a UEFA Champions League knockout stage tie on record.

programme.title: Mallorca vs Real Madrid - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 30
programme.desc: Real Club Deportivo Mallorca have won two of their last five home games against Real Madrid CF in LaLiga, one more victory than in their previous 12 encounters on the island in the competition. Real Madrid CF have won 13 of their last 16 games against Real Club Deportivo Mallorca in LaLiga, scoring in the last five. The Whites have not had a longer scoring run against the Balearic side in the competition since May 2010.

programme.title: Real Oviedo vs Sevilla - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 30
programme.desc: Real Oviedo have won their last two home games against Sevilla in LaLiga and have only once in their entire history recorded three or more consecutive home wins against them in the competition, between 1949 and 1959. Sevilla FC have lost three of their last four games against Real Oviedo in LaLiga, as many defeats as in their previous 14 top-flight encounters.

programme.title: Alavés vs Osasuna - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 30
programme.desc: Deportivo Alavés have only won one of their 10 home LaLiga games against CA Osasuna, a 2-0 victory in October 2000. They do not have a lower win percentage against any other opponent they have faced at least six times at home in the competition. CA Osasuna are unbeaten in their last 12 LaLiga matches against Deportivo Alavés. They have only enjoyed a better unbeaten run in the top-flight against Elche and Cádiz.

programme.title: Atlético de Madrid vs Barcelona - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 30
programme.desc: Atlético de Madrid have won three of their last seven games at the Riyadh Air Metropolitano against FC Barcelona in all competitions, including a 4-0 victory in February 2026 in the Copa del Rey during the Blaugrana's last visit, which was their biggest home win against them since April 1989. FC Barcelona have won their last three away games against Atlético de Madrid in LaLiga, becoming the only visiting team to achieve three consecutive victories in the competition at the Riyadh Air Metropolitano.

programme.title: Paris Saint-Germain vs Toulouse - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 28
programme.desc: Paris Saint-Germain have kept 12 clean sheets against Toulouse in Ligue 1 during the QSI era, only doing better against Marseille. Paris Saint-Germain could record their 700th clean sheet in Ligue 1, becoming the eighth team to reach this tally in the history of the competition. Paris Saint-Germain also have the highest ratio of clean sheets in the top-flight.

In 2026, no team has kept fewer clean sheets than OM in the top-flight.

programme.desc: Paris FC have lost two of their three home matches against Monaco in all competitions, with their last home game against ASM being their heaviest ever home defeat in Ligue 1. programme.title: Auxerre vs Nantes - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 29
programme.desc: Auxerre have conceded at least one goal in each of their last 12 matches against Nantes in all competitions, since a 1-0 victory on 1 October 2006 in Ligue 1. Auxerre have picked up 11 points in nine Ligue 1 matches since the start of February, seven more points than Nantes over the same period and only one fewer than they managed in their first 19 matches of the season.

programme.title: Rennes vs Angers SCO - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 29
programme.desc: Rennes have scored in each of their 27 home games against Angers in Ligue 1, the highest tally of home games against the same opponent for a team while scoring every time in the division. Rennes have won five of their last seven Ligue 1 matches, with only Monaco and Lille picking up more points than SRFC over the period. Rennes are three points off the podium heading into this MD29, having been 11 points behind third place after MD21 and at the time of Habib Beye's dismissal.

programme.title: St-etienne vs Dunkerque - French Ligue 2 - 2025/2026
programme.desc: Ligue 2 is the second division of French football. programme.title: Football Legends - News
programme.desc: In the world of sports, few debates ignite passion and enthusiasm quite like the discussion surrounding the greatest football players of all time. This topic transcends generations, cultures, and nationalities, as fans passionately defend their favorites and recount unforgettable moments on the pitch. From legendary goal scorers to masterful playmakers, the players who have left an indelible mark on the game deserve recognition and celebration. " Football Legends" explore the remarkable careers and contributions of these iconic players who have shaped the beautiful game.

programme.desc: Al Jawla covers the latest news and stories from sporting events across the planet. Including latest results and latest scores from the most recent games taking place. This daily look at the latest stories provides a fast paced update to sporting events.

programme.title: Football Legends - News
programme.desc: In the world of sports, few debates ignite passion and enthusiasm quite like the discussion surrounding the greatest football players of all time. This topic transcends generations, cultures, and nationalities, as fans passionately defend their favorites and recount unforgettable moments on the pitch. From legendary goal scorers to masterful playmakers, the players who have left an indelible mark on the game deserve recognition and celebration. " Football Legends" explore the remarkable careers and contributions of these iconic players who have shaped the beautiful game.

programme.title: Nafas
programme.desc: After a major health crisis disrupts her life, Rouh finds hope in a young Syrian refugee who helps restore her confidence. However, just as love blossoms between them, her influential father intervenes, shattering her world and bringing her back to square one. That is until Ounsi Ramal, the owner of Nafas Theater, enters her life. After Rouh saves a nearly failed theatrical performance in front of a large audience, Ansi gives her a new purpose, breathing life and hope back into her existence. But now, Ghaith has returned—while Rouh is in a relationship with Ounsi. What will happen next?
